title: Code artifact kebab menu component with dropdown actions
purpose: Provides a dropdown menu for code artifacts in the editor toolbar with actions like copying import paths, showing impact, deprecating, and unlinking.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named CodeArtifactKebabMenu that accepts props for artifact metadata and callbacks for actions, along with a default export.

steps.content: Initialize state for menu open status and flash messages.
Set up effect to auto-clear flash messages after 2 seconds.
Set up effect to close menu when clicking outside.
Set up effect to close menu on Escape key press.
Define callback handlers for toggle, copy path, show impact, deprecate, and unlink actions.
Render the kebab button and dropdown menu with action items.
Toggle the open state of the dropdown menu.
Copy the file path to the clipboard.
Set flash message to indicate success or failure of the copy operation.
Close the dropdown menu after attempting the copy.
Set flash message indicating no pseudo index for the file.
Close the dropdown menu after displaying the message.
Close the dropdown menu before attempting deprecation.
Call the deprecation callback function.
IF the deprecation fails, set flash message to indicate failure.
Close the dropdown menu before attempting unlink.
Show confirmation dialog for unlinking the file.
IF user cancels the unlink, return without performing action.
Call the delete callback function to unlink the file.
IF the unlink fails, set flash message to indicate failure.
